title: Daoist Canon: Scripture of Great Peace (Taiping Jing) (Section 3)
description: From the Daoist Canon: Scripture of Great Peace (Taiping Jing)
introduction: From the Daoist Canon: Scripture of Great Peace (Taiping Jing)

translation.text: From the Scripture of Great Peace (Taiping Jing) of the Daoist Canon: One of the foundational scriptures of Chinese Taoism, preserving teachings on internal alchemy, meditation, ritual, and the cultivation of immortality.
